data.body: EPIC r4 -> 3 BLOCKs, remediated: (1) AC6 'names cutover version' undefined -> assert ## Expand + ## Contract headings present (propagated to 8f1d); (2) AC3 CI-trigger audit INCLUDED/NO_FILTER now concretely defined (enumerate verify-identity.yaml on: triggers, classify each); (3) T8: op-cert verdict must use CANONICAL schema enum -> two-phase emits certified / key_not_valid_at_era / mismatch (NOT a new bad-signature string). Fixed epic AC4 + 368c AC3 + Context + both RED test drafts (foreign/cross-key now assert mismatch). Reviews running: epic-r5 bb086mwbx, 368c-r4 b2guopi24. Note: every review round has caught real design flaws pre-code (schema gaps, broken era-reuse, KMS/Ed25519 incompat, verdict-enum consistency) - gate working as intended.
